title: New ClawHub skill: file-watcher - Watch, monitor, and diff file system changes with a polling-
content:
Watch, monitor, and diff file system changes with a polling-based file watcher. Detect creates, modifications, and deletions — no external dependencies. Zero deps (Python stdlib).

Free + MIT. Live on ClawHub: clawhub.ai/skills/skills/file-watcher

Part of the Hermes autonomous product stack (31 agent-native tools, all CI-tested).
Sponsor if useful: GitHub Sponsors / Buy Me a Coffee.
